description: Search threads. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/mailbox/threads. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include scope, read, q, limit, page.

params.name: scope
params.description: One of: [my, sent, candidates, followed, followed_candidates, followed_jobs, not_converted, general, jobs]

params.name: read
params.description: Limit threads to read(true) or unread(false) only

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit number of results, default is 60

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/mailbox/threads

Required params: company_id

Optional params: scope, read, q, limit, page
